ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography or description of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* Genre of the movie */,
  "directed_by" INTEGER /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "cast" TEXT /* A list of main actors/actresses in the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* A brief summary or synopsis of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster image */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* The production company responsible for the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the movie was produced */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* The IMDb ID for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_directed_by FOREIGN KEY ("directed_by") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the movie by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Textual review comment from the user */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been edited */,
  "last_edit_date" TEXT /* The date of the last edit to the review */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* The number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie for which ratings are aggregated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the movie */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the movie */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* The total number of likes for all reviews of the movie */,
  "total_dislikes" INTEGER /* The total number of dislikes for all reviews of the movie */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the director */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* A list of notable films directed by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., review, edit) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user when performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user's browser */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location (city, country) of the user when performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being moderated */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approved, flagged) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "moderation_date" TEXT /* Date of the moderation action */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_statistics" (
  "film_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film statistics entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie for which statistics are recorded */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the movie */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* The total number of times the movie has been viewed on the platform */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* The total number of likes for all reviews of the movie */,
  "total_dislikes" INTEGER /* The total number of dislikes for all reviews of the movie */,
  "most_recent_review_date" TEXT /* The date of the most recent review for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_statistics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
